The Ninefold vaccine is an [[Ecology of Practices]] that overcomes the [[Seven Plagues|Nine Plagues]]. The nine components are called [[Booster shots]] they only work on tandem with each other, and as such are better described as a Ninefold vaccine rather than nine vaccines 

[[Firmlaw]] is sometimes used to describe the practice of the vaccine

== Current Ninefold vaccine ==
As of October 10 2022 the booster shots for the [[new plagues]] are uncodified

These are some provisional ones

=== Provisional vaccine ===

==== α [[Domicide]] - [[Sacredness]] ====
αα [[Alienation]] - [[The Pride]]

αλ [[Angst]] - [[Inner Dialogue]]

αω [[Absurdity]] - [[Enlensing]]

==== λ [[Foolishness]] - [[Meta-attention]]/[[Truesight]] ====
λα [[Forgetting]] - [[Remembering]]

λλ [[Spiralling]]  - [[Counter-Spiralling]]

λω [[Drowning]] - [[Flow]]

==== ω [[Enstuckment|Entrapment]] - [[Gnosis]] ====
ωα [[Foreign enstuckment|Foreign Entrapment]] - [[Antibodies]] 

ωλ [[Ego enstuckment|Ego Entrapment]] -  [[Ego loosening]] 

ωω [[Empathic enstuckment|Empathic Entrapment]] - [[Larping]]

=== Issues with the provisional vaccine ===
Antibodies has anecdotal evidence, but conceptually makes a lot of sense. The question is whether there is a bigger element missing

Ego death is well established as a way out of [[Ego enstuckment|Ego Entrapment]], but it may be overkill<ref>[[Immanuelle Leonhart]]</ref> Going and doing things in nature may be a better [[booster shot]] than [[ego death]] due to being more accessible and less overkill<ref name=":02">https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ozu9Jd_Fm-I</ref><ref>https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cHFD2ycNsBs</ref>

[[Larping]] and other forms of serious play seem to be a good way to get out of [[Empathic enstuckment|Empathic Entrapment]].

== Original Sevenfold vaccine ==
This is the original sevenfold vaccine as mostly formulated by [[John Vervaeke]].<ref name=":0">https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eDwvHKJJjIQ&list=PLM3v2nl0P_5KTXEXVB1evg8c8fhum5Pdm&index=45</ref><ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20221022024150/https://evolution.faith/sevenfold-vaccine/</ref>
#[[Spiralling]] - [[Counter-Spiralling]]/[[Firmlaw]]
#[[Forgetting]] - [[Remembering]]
#[[Drowning]] - [[Flow]]
#[[Absurdity]] - [[Enlensing]]
#[[Angst]] - [[Inner Dialogue]]/[[Daemonurgy]]
#[[Alienation]] - [[The Pride]]/[[Communitas]]
#[[Enstuckment|Entrapment]] - [[Larping]]/[[Gnosis]]

== References ==
[[Category:Lambda]]
<references />
[[Category:Ninefold vaccine]]
[[sn:Ninefold Vaccine]][[Category:Nine Plagues]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Ninefold Vaccine]][[Category:Perrenial Problems]]
[[sn:Ninefold Vaccine]][[Category:Booster shots]]
[[Category:Pages]]
